summary: VenuLock Landing Page Conversion Optimization Testing Complete. All 24 features tested - 100% PASS. Verified: 3-step search form (City/Event Type/Guest Count), 'Use My Location' tab naming (not 'Near Me'), 'SEE MATCHING VENUES' CTA, new sections (Why Choose Us, Social Proof), simplified 3-step How It Works, trust badges (Verified Venues, Transparent Pricing, Booking Assistance), hero subheading text, and mobile form functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero subheading correctly reads: 'Tell us your event. We shortlist, compare, negotiate, and help you lock the right venue.'
Desktop tabs correctly show 'City' and 'Use My Location' (not 'Near Me' or 'Choose City')
Mobile tabs correctly show 'CITY' and 'USE MY LOCATION' (uppercase styling)
3-step search form implemented: City dropdown, Event Type dropdown, Guest Count dropdown
Event Type dropdown shows all 8 options: Wedding, Birthday / Anniversary, Corporate Event, Cocktail / Reception, Conference / Seminar, Exhibition, Private Party, Other
Guest Count dropdown shows all 6 options: Under 50, 50-100, 100-250, 250-500, 500-1000, 1000+
CTA button text is 'SEE MATCHING VENUES' (uppercase with arrow icon)
Reassurance line present: 'Free venue matching. No booking pressure.'
Trust badges redesigned as bordered inline cards (desktop) and badges (mobile): Verified Venues, Transparent Pricing, Booking Assistance
Why Choose VenuLock section with 3 cards: Curated Matches, Smart Comparison, Booking Support
Social Proof dark section shows: 500+ (Venues Across Top Cities), 100% (Verified Partners), End-to-End (Booking Support)
Social Proof includes 'Trusted by event planners, families, and corporate teams.' text
How It Works simplified to exactly 3 steps: Tell us what you need, Compare curated venues, Lock your venue with support
Mobile header shows VENU|LOCK logo with font-bold styling
Use My Location tab triggers geolocation request with graceful fallback ('Location unavailable. Switching to city selection.')
Mobile hamburger menu opens with all navigation links: Sign In, Browse Venues, List Your Venue, Get Started
Top Performers section renders with 3 RM cards
Footer links all working correctly (8/8 links verified)
Search navigation works with query params: /venues/search?city=Delhi&event_type=Wedding&guests=100-250
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page conversion optimization complete. Key verified changes: (1) 3-step search form with City/Event Type/Guest Count dropdowns, (2) 'Use My Location' tab naming, (3) 'SEE MATCHING VENUES' CTA, (4) New sections - Why Choose Us (3 cards), Social Proof (500+, 100%, End-to-End), (5) Simplified 3-step How It Works, (6) Trust badges redesign (Verified Venues, Transparent Pricing, Booking Assistance), (7) Mobile bolder logo with font-bold, (8) Graceful geolocation fallback. All features tested on desktop (1920px) and mobile (375px).
